screenshots.name: Sliding MusicPlayer
screenshots.description: Experience a masterpiece of fluid motion. Our signature Sliding Player Screen puts everything at your fingertips - from high-fidelity controls and 10s Seek-Leaps to quick-toggle Atmos and Theme-Switching. It's not just a player; it's a cockpit for your sound.

screenshots.name: Aesthetic Vinyl Playerscreen
screenshots.description: Retro soul meets modern control. This theme transforms your screen into a Classic Turnable, complete with additional shortcuts to set your Sleep Timer and Add to Playlist without breaking the aesthetic spell.

screenshots.name: Curved Modernist Playerscreen
screenshots.description: Clean, sophisticated and distraction-free. The Curved Modern Player utilizes soft-edge geometry for a premium, futuristic look that feels as smooth as the music sounds.

screenshots.name: Zero-Distraction Mode
screenshots.description: Focus solely on the art. With our Intelligent Fade, the Curved Modern Player elegantly hides texts and top-icons, leaving you with breathtaking, minimalist interface that highlights the album art.

screenshots.name: Faded Motion PlayerScreen
screenshots.description: Seamlessly transition between moods. The Crossfade Player features soft visual dissolves that respond to your music, maintaining full control while providing a dreamlike, flowing visual experience.

screenshots.name: The Command Center Home
screenshots.description: Your music, organized by intelligence. Toggle between For You, All Music, Playlists, and Artists with ease. Powered by our proprietary sort Algo, your library always stays exactly where you need it.

screenshots.name: Ultra-Fluid Search
screenshots.description: Search at the speed of thought. Our Refined Search UI provides instantaneous results with beautiful animations, makingb the hunt for that one specific track as enjoyable as the song itself.

screenshots.name: Professional Setting Suite
screenshots.description: Tailer DNMUSIC to your lifestyle. Manage your Library Scans, toggle Headphone Detach behavior, customize Widgets, and explore the DNATMOS configurations all from one unified hub.

screenshots.name: FAQ Section
screenshots.description: Get instant clarity. Our comprehensive FAQ Panel is designed to solve problems before they happen, offering deep insights and quick fixes to ensure your playback never stops.

screenshots.name: Plyerscreen Theme Gallery
screenshots.description: Refresh your look in an instant. Swipe through Five Exclusive Player Themes in the preview panel; simply select one to instantly transform the entire playback environment.

screenshots.name: 'For You' Discovery Tab
screenshots.description: Your personal DJ. The For You tab curates your Last Added, Most Played, and Featured Tracks. One tap on the Shuffle button delivers a perfectly personalized session based on your habits.

screenshots.name: Smart Playlist Engine
screenshots.description: Beyond manual creation. In addition to user-made lists, DNMUSIC provides four Auto-Evolving Playlists - including a Most Played list with an integrated play-countere to track your true favorites.

screenshots.name: Visual Playlist Portals
screenshots.description: Every playlist tells a story. View your collections through the lens of the Lead Track's Cover Art, with a dedicated control panel for bulk adding, removing, or shuffling.

screenshots.name: The Artist Archive
screenshots.description: A tribute to the creators. Sort your library by Artist Name with a specialized filter for 'Unknown Artists', ensuring your entire collection is polished and perfectly categorized.

screenshots.name: Dynamic Home Widgets
screenshots.description: Bring DNMUSIC to your home screen. Our Pro Widgets allow you to skip, pause, and heart tracks without ever unlocking your phone or opening the app.

screenshots.name: The Spectrum Skin System
screenshots.description: Color your world. Choose from 12 Subtle Skin Tones that propagate through the entire app's architechture, matching your player to your personal style.

screenshots.name: Genre-Flow Navigation
screenshots.description: Explore the vertical dimension. The Atmos Right Panel features smooth, upward-scrolling genres, allowing you to drift through different musical moods with effortless swipes.

screenshots.name: DNATMOS Player Screen
screenshots.description: The ultimate relaxation tool. The Atmos Main Screen blends high-quality audio with Integrated Nature Sounds. Set a specialized timer (15-120 mins) to let the music and the wild carry you to sleep.

screenshots.name: Dediacted ATMOS Library
screenshots.description: Your high-fidelity vault. The Atmos Left Panel houses your dedicated genre tarcks, detailed metadata, and offline downloads for an uninterrupted immersive experience.

screenshots.name: Sound Mix Labratory
screenshots.description: Become the architect of your own environment. The Sound Mix Panel allows you to layer up to 4 Natural Textures (rain, thunder, wind, waves, birds, etc.) over your music, with stunning additional volume sliders for each element.

screenshots.name: Atmos Discovery Bottom Panel
screenshots.description: Explore the unknown. Use the Atmos Bottom Panel to find curated sounds and music modes specifically designed for focus, relaxation, or deep sleep.

screenshots.name: The Smart Queue
screenshots.description: Take total control of your listening flow. Seamlessly shuffle, reorder, or clear your upcoming tracks with single tap. Whether you're planning the next hour or living in the moment, the Queue Panel keeps your vibe on track.

screenshots.name: The Command Center
screenshots.description: Your all-in-one toolkit for song manipulation. Access everything from Ringtone setup and Metadata info to Sleep Timers and Playback Speed without ever leaving your current view. Precision control, tucked neatly to the side.

screenshots.name: Deep Metadata Insights
screenshots.description: Knowledge is power. Dive into the DNA of your music with the Song Info Panel. Track every detail - from high-fidelity bitrates and bits per sample to file locations and timestamps. It's the ultimate dashboard for the true audiophile.

screenshots.name: Intelligent Sleep Timer
screenshots.description: Drift off to your favorite melodies on your own terms. Choose from Quick-Presets (15 to 60 mins) or use our Fluid Carousel for a custom countdown. Plus, stay in control with External Notification Support, allowing you to extend or stop the timer without reopenig the app.

screenshots.name: Precision Playback Control
screenshots.description: Find your perfect tempo. Use our Quick-Taps for 0.5x to 2.0x speeds, or use the Fine-Tune Slider for surgical accuracy. Perfect for practicing instruments, transcribing, or just experiencing your music at different pace.

screenshots.name: Instant Ringtone Studio
screenshots.description: Make your favorite anthem your identity. Once granted permission, DNMUSIC lets you transform any track into your System Ringtone instantly. Your Music, Your Call.

screenshots.name: Custom Cover Art Gallery
screenshots.description: Visuals that match the mood. Persolalize your library by uploading custom artwork from your device. Want to go back to the original? One tap restores the native metadata art instantly.

screenshots.name: Seamless Playlist Integration
screenshots.description: Building your dream library is effortless. Quickly tag songs as Favorites or sort them into Custom Playlists through an intuitive, streamlined interface.

screenshots.name: Master Playlist Management
screenshots.description: The ultimate curator's tool. Batch-delete old lists, rename on the fly, or inject entire playlists directly into your 'Play Next' queue. Managing your collection has never been this organized.

screenshots.name: The Lyrics Workshop
screenshots.description: Never miss a word. Fetch lyrics via Global Online Search (just tap and copy), import your own .txt or .lrc files, or manually craft the perfect transcription. Your music, now fully narrated.

screenshots.name: Lyrics Display
screenshots.description: Experience your music in high definition. The dedicated Lyrics Screen offers a clean, distraction-free view or every verse. Need a change? Easily reset or overwrite lyrics to keep your library polished and accurate.
